玩法攻略 Mode Guide

粉爪大劫案进阶收益路线：5月版本百万方斯撤离的背包取舍 Advanced Pinkpaw Heist Profit Route: Backpack Choices for Million-Fons Extractions

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-22 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：12 分钟Read time: 12 min

攻略速览

粉爪大劫案的收益并不只看你能打多少怪，而是看是否能在倒计时内把高价值物品带出。2026 年 5 月版本里，稳定百万方斯撤离的关键是先确认撤离点、再决定深入层数，并用背包价值密度筛掉低收益物品。

前置条件与接取方式

玩法目标

高价值搜刮后从红色电话亭撤离

关键道具

门禁卡、迷核、背包扩容和恢复道具

收益原则

优先价值密度，不贪低价物资

进阶撤离流程

收益来自取舍

1

入场先记撤离点

看到激活电话亭就记路线

不要等背包满了再找撤离点。每局前半段就要确认至少两个可用撤离方向，避免后期被敌人、监控或迷路拖死。

2

LG1只做过渡

拿门卡、补给和中高价值物品

办公层收益不算最高，但安全性好。这里的核心价值是补关键道具，不建议为了低价杂物浪费背包格子。

3

LG2重点搜展柜

优先宝石、名画、保险柜和激光房

藏品层是稳定收益核心。只要撤离点位置不错，LG2 就能支撑一局不错的收益，不一定非要冒险进金库层。

4

LG3看条件进入

有门卡、有时间、有撤离路线再进

金库层收益高但风险也高。如果剩余时间不足或撤离点太远，不如在 LG2 补高价值物品后直接撤离。

5

剩余一分钟停手

无论背包是否满，都开始撤离

最亏的不是少拿一件物品，而是满包超时。高价值物品到手后，撤离成功率永远优先于继续搜刮。

翻车点

贪搜和路线断裂

粉爪大劫案的失败大多来自贪心。玩家明明已经拿到高价值物品，却因为想补满背包而错过撤离窗口。

  • 背包出现高价值藏品后，立即重新评估是否继续深入。
  • 低价值物资只在背包空且撤离路线安全时拾取。
  • 不熟悉地图时，宁愿少进一层，也不要在倒计时后半段找路。

完成奖励

方斯 爪爪币 宝石 名画 金条 高价值藏品

进阶粉爪不是把地图清空，而是在最短时间内完成高价值搜刮并安全撤离。能稳定带走收益，比偶尔赌一局极限更适合长期养成。

完整解析

粉爪大劫案最有趣的地方在于，它不是传统刷本，而是撤离收益玩法。你必须不断判断：继续搜是否值得，背包格子是否该留给更贵的物品，当前撤离路线是否安全。

背包价值密度是进阶玩家必须建立的概念。占一个格子的低价物资，如果会阻止你拾取宝石、名画或高价值藏品，就等于隐性亏损。看到高价物品后，应主动丢弃低收益物资。

LG3 金库层不应每局强进。门卡、迷核、时间、血量、撤离点位置缺一不可。只要任一条件不满足，LG2 稳定搜刮后撤离往往更赚，因为长期平均收益更高。

撤离时间建议设硬规则：剩余 1 分钟停止搜刮，剩余 40 秒必须在撤离路线中，剩余 20 秒还没看到电话亭就放弃绕路。这种规则会让收益更稳定。

Guide Snapshot

Pinkpaw Heist rewards extraction judgment more than combat volume. In the May version, stable million-Fons runs depend on confirming exits early, choosing how deep to go and filtering low-value loot by backpack value density.

Requirements and Entry

Mode goal

Loot high-value items and extract through red phone booths

Key tools

Keycards, mystery cores, backpack expansion and recovery items

Profit rule

Prioritize value density and avoid greed for cheap loot

Advanced Extraction Flow

Profit comes from choosing what to skip

1

Mark exits immediately

Remember routes whenever you see an active phone booth.

Do not wait until your bag is full. Confirm at least two exit directions early to avoid dying to enemies, surveillance or getting lost.

2

Use LG1 as transition

Take keycards, supplies and medium-high value items.

The office layer is safer but not the richest. Its main value is key items, not low-price filler.

3

Prioritize display cases on LG2

Check gems, paintings, safes and laser rooms.

The collection layer is the stable-profit core. Good LG2 routing can support a strong run without forcing LG3.

4

Enter LG3 only with conditions

Go deeper only with keycard, time and an exit route.

The vault has the highest ceiling and highest risk. If time or exit position is poor, fill with LG2 valuables and leave.

5

Stop looting at one minute

Begin extraction whether the bag is full or not.

The biggest loss is timing out with a full backpack. After expensive loot is secured, extraction chance beats another search room.

Failure Points

Greed and broken routes

Most failures happen after players already have valuable loot but keep searching to fill the last slots.

  • Re-evaluate the route immediately after finding a high-value collectible.
  • Pick low-value items only when the bag is empty and the exit route is safe.
  • If you do not know the map well, skip deeper layers instead of pathfinding in the final half of the timer.

Rewards

Fons Paw coins Gems Paintings Gold bars High-value collectibles

Advanced Pinkpaw play is not about emptying the map. It is about extracting high-value loot quickly and safely. Stable average profit beats rare all-in jackpot runs for long-term growth.

Full Analysis

The mode is interesting because every minute asks a question: is another room worth it, should a backpack slot be saved, and is the current exit safe?

Backpack value density is the core concept. A cheap one-slot item becomes a loss if it blocks a gem, painting or premium collectible.

Do not force LG3 every run. Keycard, mystery core, time, health and exit position all matter. If one condition is missing, LG2 extraction often wins in long-term average profit.

Use a hard extraction rule: stop looting at 60 seconds, be on the route by 40 seconds, and abandon detours if no booth is visible by 20 seconds.
